headline: Dow Rises 500 Points. It’s Not a Broad Rally.
summary: The Dow gained 500 points on Tuesday, but chip stocks were still running the show. The blue-chip index was up 0.9%, while the Nasdaq was up 1.4%. The S&P 500 was up 0.9%. Only half the Dow stocks were up on the day, but Caterpillar, UnitedHealth, and Goldman Sachs were all up 3% or more.
